name: Prairie State Bank And Trust
description_short: Prairie State Bank and Trust is a community bank in Central Illinois offering personal banking, business banking, mortgages, and credit cards with a local focus.
description_long:
Prairie State Bank and Trust operates as a community-focused financial institution serving Central Illinois. The bank positions itself as a locally-oriented alternative to larger national banks, emphasizing personal relationships and understanding of regional business needs. With a routing number (071114763) and physical branch network, they operate as a traditional brick-and-mortar bank rather than a digital-only institution.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, digital banking enrollment, credit card products, business banking solutions for companies at various growth stages, and a dedicated Mortgage Loan Center. Their mortgage services specifically highlight competitive rates and pre-qualification support for home buyers. They provide traditional banking infrastructure including branches, ATMs, and phone support (1-800-597-2977).

Prairie State Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on local community banking expertise and personalized service. They target both individual consumers at various life stages and small-to-medium businesses requiring tailored financial management solutions. The bank actively addresses security concerns through prominent scam alerts on their homepage, warning customers about impostor calls, texts, and emails.

As a traditional community bank, Prairie State Bank serves customers seeking local relationships and branch access rather than the lowest rates or most innovative fintech features. Their strength lies in personalized service and understanding of local business communities, though specific product rates, fee structures, and competitive positioning versus national banks cannot be determined from available website content. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Digital banking enrollment and online account management
Mortgage loans and home purchase pre-qualification
Business banking for small and growing companies
Business lines of credit and lending
Mortgage rate consultation and loan origination
pros: Local community bank with physical branches and ATM network in Central Illinois
Comprehensive services including personal banking, business banking, mortgages, and credit cards
Dedicated Mortgage Loan Center with emphasis on competitive rates and pre-qualification support
Digital banking enrollment available for online account management
Explicit scam alert warnings to protect customers from fraud and identity theft
Business banking tailored to companies at different growth stages (startup, expansion)
Direct phone support line (1-800-597-2977) for customer service
cons: Limited geographic presence (Central Illinois only) restricts accessibility for out-of-region customers
Website provides no specific information on interest rates, fees, or APRs for any products
No details available about credit card rewards programs, earning structures, or card types offered
Mortgage terms, rates, and specific loan products not detailed on the website
No information about minimum balances, account requirements, or promotional offers
best_for: Central Illinois residents seeking a local community bank with branch access
Small-to-medium business owners needing personalized banking relationships
Homebuyers in the region interested in working with a local mortgage lender
Customers prioritizing branch relationships over digital-only or national bank options
diagnosis: Prairie State Bank and Trust is best suited for Central Illinois residents and business owners seeking personalized community banking with local branch access and relationships. The primary caveat is that specific product details, rates, and fees are not available on their website, requiring direct contact to compare competitiveness against regional and national competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Prairie State Bank and Trust is a community bank in Central Illinois offering personal and business banking.
